name: Caramel Sweetened Condensed Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove label from can.
2. Place UNOPENED can in the bottom of a VERY DEEP pot, such as a deep Dutch oven.
3. Cover with water so that the water is 3 to 4 inches above the can.
4. Bring the water to a boil and maintain a steady boil for four (4) hours.
5. Ensure the can remains always totally covered with water. Never let the water level get down to the top of the can, as this could cause the can to explode.
After four (4) hours is up:
1. Remove the can from the pot using tongs and place it on a wire rack to cool.
2. Once cooled, refrigerate.
3. Open the can when ready to use; you will have soft caramel with even the color being caramel.
4. Note: Boiling one can may leave you wishing you had boiled two or three.
